title: Discover the CLASSIFY command contract
description: Publish every first-release CLASSIFY capability through the shared versioned Tally operation registry before evaluation or mutation. Implements G5 and UC-CLASSIFY-006.
rationale: An AI Agent Host must discover exact schemas, limits, errors, and mutation semantics without scraping prose or reading CLASSIFY storage.
story_want: my agent to discover the complete classification contract
story_so_that: every workflow uses compatible operations and predictable safety rules
acceptance_criteria: Given a compatible Tally executable, when schema discovery is requested, then the registry exposes every operation required by C12 with its versioned input, result, error, exit, mutability, idempotency, limit, and compatibility contract.
Given any public CLASSIFY operation, when its schema is requested repeatedly for the same contract version, then the semantic descriptor is deterministic.
Given an unknown CLASSIFY operation, when schema or invocation is requested, then Tally returns a stable unknown-operation error and no private storage detail.
Given contract discovery, when descriptors are returned, then no CLASSIFY store, private corpus, or LEDGER data read occurs.
security_criteria: Help, schemas, diagnostics, and errors contain no transaction descriptions, normalized tokens, rules, corpus rows, financial values, credentials, or local paths.
